documentText:
Subject: Re: Account Access Issue – Ticket #48291

Hi support team,

My name is Daniel Reyes and I'm having trouble logging into my account. I tried resetting my password but never received the reset email. Could you check if there's an issue tied to daniel.reyes88@gmail.com?

For reference, my account was created in March 2019, and I've been a customer for about five years now.

If it's easier, you can reach me directly at (512) 555-0199 — I'm usually free in the afternoons.

I also noticed a charge of $245.00 from "Bright Horizon Consulting" on my last statement that I don't recognize. Could someone look into that?

Thanks,
Daniel
